    • GovernmentBodyAnnualSummary

      public GovernmentBodyAnnualSummary(int year, java.lang.String name, int consecutiveNumber, java.lang.String govermentBodyId, java.lang.String mCode, java.lang.String ministry, java.lang.String orgNumber, int headCount, int annualWorkHeadCount, java.lang.String vat, java.lang.String comment)
      Instantiates a new government body annual summary.
      Parameters:
      year - the year
      name - the name
      consecutiveNumber - the consecutive number
      govermentBodyId - the goverment body id
      mCode - the m code
      ministry - the ministry
      orgNumber - the org number
      headCount - the head count
      annualWorkHeadCount - the annual work head count
      vat - the vat
      comment - the comment
